title: OpenAPI Encoding Object
description: A single encoding definition applied to a single schema property.

contentType.description: The Content-Type for encoding a specific property.

headers.description: A map allowing additional information to be provided as headers.

style.description: Describes how a specific property value will be serialized.

explode.description: Whether parameter values of type array or object generate separate parameters.

allowReserved.description: Whether the parameter value allows reserved characters.
